name: Metal Wyrm
tips: The discount is a comeback tool: with an empty board against a developed opponent it drops to 2 mana — a 33🗡️/33🤍 body plus a draw for almost nothing.
The condition checks the moment you play it: your opponent must have at least one living minion and you must have none.
Tree Wyrm's tutor fetches Metal Wyrms — 'Tutor 2 Wyrms' can restock your hand with cheap stabilizers.
Pairs naturally with sacrifice lines: cashing in your last minion for face damage re-arms the discount for your follow-up Metal Wyrm.
rulings: The reduction applies while your opponent controls at least one living minion AND you control none — checked when the card is played, not when it was drawn.
The discount is exactly 3: 5 mana becomes 2. It cannot reduce the cost below 0.
Minions at 0🤍 awaiting cleanup do not count as living for either side of the condition.
Summon: Draw 1 fires after the summon resolves (Window B); a full hand overdraw-burns the drawn card.
